log: === ROUND 1 ===

→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 20] FAIL! 31 necrotic damage. HP: 28/59
--- Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
